name: Eggs Motul Style
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, combine the dry black beans and water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until tender.
2. Add chopped onion, minced garlic, salt, finely chopped tomatoes, vegetable oil, peas, ham, and cayenne pepper. Cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk the eggs with about half a cup of shredded Monterey Jack cheese.
4. Place the tortillas on a flat surface. Pour the egg mixture evenly over each tortilla.
5. Cover the tortillas with plastic wrap and refrigerate until ready to serve.
